description: Comprehensive mapping of Yoga Sutras I.41-51 to Fichte's Science of Knowing and Hegel's Science of Logic, anchored strictly in prajna-greater-bhasya.tex

mappings.fichte_core: The absolute Light, Pure transparent crystal, Methodological suspension of factical fluctuations
mappings.hegel_core: Pure being, pure indeterminateness and emptiness. 'There is nothing to be intuited in it... only this pure empty intuiting itself' (Lines 125-140).

mappings.fichte_core: The Anstoß (Check), the mixing/contamination of knowing and being via discursive word/meaning
mappings.hegel_core: Existence as determinate being (Dasein). 'Through its quality, something is opposed to an other; it is alterable and finite' (Lines 278-291).

mappings.fichte_core: Purified memory, the One shining as the object alone, True Infinity, absolute self-reference
mappings.hegel_core: Being-for-itself, infinite being. 'The one passes over into a multiplicity of ones, repulsion' (Lines 322-361).

mappings.sanskrit_core: etayaiva savicārā nirvicārā ca sūkṣma-viṣayā vyākhyātā
mappings.fichte_core: Continuous productive imagination, converting qualitative boundaries into subtle spatial/temporal continuums
mappings.hegel_core: Pure Quantity. 'Quantity is the determinateness that has become indifferent to being; a limit which is just as much no limit... the repulsion of the many ones which is immediate non-repulsion, their continuity' (Lines 377-412).

mappings.fichte_core: Arrest of the productive imagination, positing an empty mathematical boundary or abstract degree
mappings.hegel_core: Quantum as determinate quantity. 'Quantity proceeds to determinateness... Quantity becomes quantum. Quantum is indifferent determinateness' (Lines 413-422).

mappings.fichte_core: Vicious infinite progress (the bad infinity) driven by the un-sublated hiatus irrationalis ('seed')
mappings.hegel_core: Quantitative Ratio. 'Quantum in qualitative form is quantitative ratio... it transcends itself into its otherness... is another quantum... formal unity of quality and quantity' (Lines 423-441).

mappings.fichte_core: Proficiency rejecting outward expansion; the absolute light resting in its own pure immanence
mappings.hegel_core: Measure uniting quality and quantity. 'Quantity is being that has returned to itself... [Measure is] the externality that refers itself to itself... as taken back into itself, the qualitative' (Lines 462-473).

mappings.sanskrit_core: ṛtambharā tatra prajñā ... śruta-anumāna-prajñābhyām anya-viṣayā viśeṣa-arthatvāt
mappings.fichte_core: Genetic deduction of the Absolute vs factical inference; gripping the specific living Act rather than general abstracts
mappings.hegel_core: Real Measure and the Spinozistic Mode. The Indian Trinity explicitly: 'Brahma... Vishnu... to the third, Shiva. The determination of this third is that of mode, alteration, coming-to-be and passing-away' (Lines 509-541).

mappings.sanskrit_core: taj-jaḥ saṃskāro 'nya-saṃskāra-pratibandhī ... tasyāpi nirodhe sarva-nirodhān nirbījaḥ samādhiḥ
mappings.fichte_core: The Methodological Maxim acting as inhibitor (pratibandhī), followed by its own self-consumption to enter the Living Esse (nirbīja)
mappings.hegel_core: Critique of Oriental annihilation. The goal 'is to sink into unconsciousness, into unity with Brahma, annihilation; the Buddhist Nirvana, Nibbana, etc... a sinking of all content into an only formal unity void of content' (Lines 567-573). Measure as sublated 'has passed over into essence' (Line 644).
